changes.summary: AFL links that point back to MFL now actually point at the AFL. A pair of long-standing wiring mistakes had AFL pages borrowing TheLeague's MFL server for outbound links: the What's Next event buttons (live scoring, options pages) and the Playoffs page's live-scoring polls and league-options link were all built against TheLeague's www49 host — so an AFL owner clicking through could land on the wrong league entirely. Both now resolve the AFL's own MFL server from the league registry, every time.
